task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the tax documents from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file explorer or PDF viewer open with files from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vance\.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new tax return was created for Julian Vance in StudioTax 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 interface showing 'Julian Vance' in the personal information section, forms, or return header.

task_completion.description: Verify that retiring allowances (eligible and non-eligible) were entered into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 interface showing a T4 slip entry with retiring allowance boxes (e.g., Box 66 for eligible, Box 67 for non-eligible) filled out.

task_completion.description: Verify that the direct RRSP transfer of the eligible portion was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 interface showing the RRSP contribution/transfer section or Schedule 7 filled out with the eligible retiring allowance transfer amount.

task_completion.description: Verify that EI benefits were entered into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 interface showing a T4E slip entry with EI benefits filled out.

task_completion.description: Verify that legal fees paid to secure severance were entered as a deduction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 interface showing a deduction for legal fees (e.g., Line 23200 - Other deductions) filled out.

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed return was saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 save dialog or a file explorer window showing 'julian_vance.24t' saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active interaction with the StudioTax 2024 application windows, forms, and menus, rather than a text editor or script modifying the .24t file directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually viewed the tax documents to extract the necessary values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the tax documents being opened and read on screen, rather than the agent guessing or hallucinating values.

integrity.description: Verify that the output file was saved via the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'julian_vance.24t' should be created through the StudioTax 'Save' or 'Save As' functionality, not generated via terminal commands like 'echo' or 'touch'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output file must be saved exactly as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julian_vance.24t'.
